title: The One With The Red Sweater

lines.text: The Hotel Lobby, Rachel and Phoebe are at the front desk checking out.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Listen y'know what sir? For the last time, I don't care what the computer says, we did not take a bag of Mashuga nuts from the mini-bar and we did not watch Dr. Do-Me-A-Little!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh! Joey uh, were you in our room last night?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No. (Phoebe grabs the receipt and shows it to Joey who gets mad.) I was told the name of the movie would not appear on the bill!
Chandler and Monica enter.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to the front desk clerk) Hi! We're checking out of the bridal suite.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (depressed) That's right. I'm no longer a bride. I'll never be a bride again. Now, I'm just someone's wife!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: And I'm the happiest guy in the world! (Monica goes and sits down in a huff.) Oh honey, come on don't be upset. We still have so much to look forward to!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah, right. (Rolls her eyes.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We got the honeymoon.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's not 'til Thursday.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The wedding pictures?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: They won't be ready for weeks.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Not the disposable cameras from the tables.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's true! (Happily) I knew I married you for a reason!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'll tell you what, I will go get them developed and you can go home.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.
Joey giggles.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What? What did you take a picture of?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Nothing! It was something.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay Ross has the cameras, has he checked out yet?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Are you joking? Check out is not 'til noon and he has a good (checks her watch) eleven minutes left.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross has never checked out of a room a minute before he had to.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, one time, when we were dating, uh we got a late checkout, he got so excited it was the best sex we ever had. Until y'know, he screamed out Radisson at the end.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, well I'm gonna get Ross, get the cameras, and get them developed. (Joey laughs again.) 32 Joe. You're 32! (Exits)

lines.speaker: Front Desk Clerk
lines.text: (To Monica) Here's a copy of your bill.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh thanks. (Reading the bill) Champagne, strawberries...Oh my God! I can't believe Chandler ordered porn on our wedding night!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, that's sad. Mashuga nut?
Opening Credits
Ross's Hotel Room, he is letting Chandler in.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hi.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey. (He sees that Ross is packing all of the hotel toiletries) Soaps? Shampoos? Are you really taking all this stuff?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Why not? It's built into the price of the room.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah but you don't need-(Picks up something)-What is this?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Thread!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Score! Where are the disposable cameras?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What disposable cameras?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The cameras? Remember last night I told you to take them?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No you didn't.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes! Remember? Right before we cut the cake, I went up to you and I said...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh-oh yeah, you-you came up to me and asked if I could do you a favor, and my Uncle Murray came up to you and handed you a check. And then you said, "Why do they call it a check? Why not a Yugoslavian?" (Chandler laughs.) Yeah, then you did that.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you don't have the cameras?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. Sorry man.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So? What? What? They're gone! Monica's gonna freak!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I'm sure they're still somewhere here in the hotel. I'll-I'll help you look for them.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Great.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: In-in three minutes.
Chandler goes into the bathroom, closes the door, and then opens it again right away. Ross looks up and hands him the toilet paper Ross already packed.
Monica and Chandler's, Phoebe is entering to see Monica sitting in front of a mound of wedding gifts.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Are you gonna open the presents without Chandler?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! (Pause) But, they're callin' out to me! I mean this little guy (Holds up a small one) even crawled up into my lap. Oh come on, Chandler wouldn't mind if I opened just one present! What do you think it is?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: A little mirror that when you look into it you see yourself as an old woman.
Monica opens it anyways.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: A tiny salt shaker!!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohhh! My God! For tiny salt!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh wow! Okay. Well that was fun.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Good. Okay, I'm just gonna wait for Chandler to open the rest of them.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Whew. Although y'know, this is part of a salt and pepper set. I mean... I guess y'know it may just count as a half a present. What do you think?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well I guess it's okay to open one more if it's part of a set. Y'know, it's probably this one. (Grabs another small one.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Or this one! (She grabs and starts to open the biggest present.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, how are you feelin'? Any morning sickness?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Shh-shh-shh! The guys don't know yet do they?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! Joey and Ross don't know anything and Chandler still thinks that Phoebe's pregnant.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah that's right Chandler does still think I'm pregnant. He hasn't asked me how I'm feeling or offered to carry my bags. Boy, I feel bad for the woman who ends up with him. (Monica looks at her.) After you of course.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Don't worry I promise that you will only have to be pregnant for a few more hours, 'cause I'm going to tell the father today.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh, is it someone in this building? Is it that tall guy from the first floor?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ew! No!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?! I think he's cute.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then you have his baby.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Believe me I'm trying.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow. Y'know it is so weird. I mean, you're gonna tell this guy today and he has no idea what's gonna happen.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah. You're just gonna knock on his door and change his life forever. You're like Ed McMahon except without the big check, or the raw sexual magnetism.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Uh-huh, I guess it is pretty big news.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Pretty big? It's huge! God, this guy doesn't have a clue! He's just walking down the street thinking, 'I had sex with Rachel Green. I rock!' then bam! He's a father and everything's different.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well it's only different if he wants it to be. I mean, I'm not gonna ask him for anything.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay. Then he still has this huge decision to make. Now he's walking around thinking, 'Do I want to be a dad?' and then bam!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What was that bam?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't. He got...he-he-he-he's hit by a bus.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey Joey, what would you do if someone that you slept with told you that she was pregnant?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (warily) Who called here? Did she sound blond? Huh? Did-did-did she have an accent? I gotta make a call! (Starts to leave) I shoulda never walked into that Sunglass Hut!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Joey! Joey! No, it's not you! You didn't get anybody pregnant!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh. Why would you scare me like that? What the hell is going on? (Pause.) Is somebody pregnant?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah. That's me.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God Pheebs! You're gonna have a baby?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes. Yes I am. Oh my God, I'm gonna have a baby! (Joey and Phoebe hug.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa, wait a minute. Who's the father?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You don't know him. It's not important. He wants nothing to do with me or the baby. (She sits down like she's pregnant.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well who is this guy?! Huh? Who is he? 'Cause I will track him down and kick his ass!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: David Lynn.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: David Lynn! David Lynn! David Lynn!! (Exits)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Who's David Lynn?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh some guy from my gym. A little annoying.
The Banquet Room, Chandler is under one of the tables as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Did you find the cameras?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No. Did you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes! And that's why I'm under the table. Celebrating.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I checked in the uh, lost and found, I talked to the manager, no-one's turned them.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well this is great. Y'know, those cameras were the only thing that was gonna cheer Monica up today, she's really depressed.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Now you guys just got married, why is she so depressed?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All my energy is going into not asking that question. I can't believe I screwed this up!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry man. (Formally dressed people start to enter.) Here's a thought. This is the same ballroom. There's a band. There's gonna be plenty of dressed up people.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you suggesting we dance our troubles away?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no-no, I'm saying we-we buy more of this (disposable cameras) at the gift shop, throw our tuxes back on, and take a few pictures. All we have to do is make sure not to get anybody else's faces.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Are you serious?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm just thinking about your new bride at home. Okay? Do-do you really want to start your life together by letting her down?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Marriage advice? Really?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm telling you, this looks exactly like your wedding! Aren't these the same flowers?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know, Monica picked out the flowers.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What about the chairs?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: She picked those out too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How about the place settings?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: That was her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What did you do?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was in charge of the cameras! Gift shop?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hmm. (They head off to the gift shop.)
Central Perk, Rachel is sitting on the couch as Phoebe enters.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey! Ooh, did you do it yet?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, well what are you doing here? Are you about to do it? (Gasps) Is it Gunther?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Phoebe, it's not Gunther.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank God, 'cause that hair on a baby...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Phoebe the father is not here okay? I haven't told him yet and I don't think I can tell him at all now!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't know, let me think. I was walking down the street thinking, 'I'm gonna tell the father today' and then bam!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Bus?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, you! Phoebe you freaked me out. You kept saying how huge this all is!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well-well but it is huge.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I know, but I was just thinking about how huge this is for me. I didn't even go to how huge this was going to be for the father.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're thinking about this way too much. Just tell him and get it over with. It's like, it's like ripping off this Band-Aid. (On her arm) Quick and painless, watch. (Rips it off.) Oh mother of...See?
Monica and Chandler's, Obsessive Monica has now opened more of the wedding gifts.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Ooh-ooh-ooh! Are we opening presents?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! No! I shouldn't have even opened these! I mean I-Joey I am out of control!! Joey, you have to do me a favor. No matter what I say, no matter what I do, please do not let me open another present! Okay?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Give me one more.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. (Hands her one.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh good, uh you're here. Uh Pheebs? Listen uh sit down. I-I got something I want to say.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All right. (She sits down like she's pregnant again.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Umm, now uh... It's a scary world out there, especially for a single mom. Y'know, now I always thought you and I had a special bond so... (He goes to one knee and pulls out a ring.) Phoebe Buffay, will you marry me?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! Joey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hell yeah! I'll marry you! (She grabs the ring and puts it on.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You can't marry him!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey lady, your day's over! It's my turn!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why?! Why can't she marry me?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can and I will! (Kisses him.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's not pregnant. It's Rachel. Rachel's the one who's pregnant.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe I think he would notice if you didn't have a baby in nine months!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's Joey! (Joey turns and looks at her and she mouths 'I love you' to him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (smiles then stops) Now I can't believe it! What? Rachel's pregnant? (The girls nod yes.) Who's the father?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We don't know.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ohh... I wonder if that dude.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There's a dude?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Who? Who is it?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: About a month ago this guy spent the night with Rachel, I didn't see who it was but... (He walks out and closes the door.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Was that story over?
They follow him and meet him in the hall coming out of his apartment carrying a sweater.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: The guy left this.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (gasps) Oh my God! I know who the father is... (She walks into Monica and Chandler's.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: People have got to finish their stories!
Commercial Break
The Banquet Room, Ross and Chandler are in their tuxes and have started to fake the pictures.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (to another couple) Uh, excuse me? Could you take a picture of us?

lines.speaker: Woman At The Wedding
lines.text: Oh! Of course. (Ross and Chandler pose and she takes the picture.)

lines.speaker: Man At The Wedding
lines.text: Uh, would you take one of us?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uhh... Yeah sure. (Holds the camera up to his face.) Click!

lines.speaker: Woman At The Wedding
lines.text: It didn't click.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I heard it. I heard it.

lines.speaker: Man At The Wedding
lines.text: But there was no flash.

lines.speaker: Woman At The Wedding
lines.text: Why won't you take our picture?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah. I'll take, I'll take your picture. (He takes the picture with his finger over the lens.)

lines.speaker: Man At The Wedding
lines.text: Uh, your finger was covering the lens.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who are you? Ansel Adams?! Get outta here!
Outside Central Perk, Rachel and Phoebe are about to go inside.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look, I feel really bad about how I freaked you out before, so I called the father and asked him to meet you here so you can tell him. Go!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What? Hey wait a minute! Phoebe, how do you even know who the father is?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I may play the fool at times, but I'm a little more than a pretty blond girl with an ass that won't quit. (She takes the sweater out of her purse.) I believe this belongs to the father of your baby.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh God... Oh, he's in there right now?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh-huh. Now you can turn around or you can go in there and rip the Band-Aid off. What to you want to do?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Uh, let's rip!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? Are you sure?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Phoebe!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, sorry. Yeah. (They go inside to confront the father.)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Hey Rach.
The Banquet Room, Ross is taking a picture of a plant, Chandler a fork. The band stops.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Why don't you go up on stage. I'll get a picture of you doing the speech.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. Okay!
He goes up on stage, mimes like he's giving the speech, and Chandler takes his picture. However, before he gets down everyone starts clinking their glasses for a real speech.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Will the owner of a 1995 Buick LeSabre please see the front desk? Your car is about to be towed.

lines.speaker: Anxious Wedding Guest
lines.text: (rushing up) That's my car!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A '95 LeSabre?!

lines.speaker: Anxious Wedding Guest
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A green LeSabre?

lines.speaker: Anxious Wedding Guest
lines.text: Yes!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry, I meant a blue LeSabre.

lines.speaker: Anxious Wedding Guest
lines.text: Yes! Green-blue!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well go! Go move it! (He runs off.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, you ready for the last picture?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Get ready to run. (Chandler walks over to the new bride.) Congratulations on your wedding. (He grabs her, kisses her, Ross takes the picture, and they both run out.)
Central Perk, continued from earlier.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: So, what's this about?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Rachel has something that she wants to tell you and umm, I believe that this is your red sweater.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: No. (Unzips his coat.) This is my red sweater.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh no. Could I get anyone a coffee or...poison? No? Just for me? Okay. (Walks away.)

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: What's going on Rach?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Nothing! Phoebe kinda made a mistake. But y'know you do wear that sweater a lot, are you involved in some kind of dare?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Y'know, I'm actually glad Phoebe called. (He pulls out a stool and Rachel sits down.) I know we broke up because you thought I wasn't mature enough, but I've really grown up and think we should get back together.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's just not the right time.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: It is the right time. (Takes her hand.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: I'm ready for more.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Tag...

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Come on Rach, let's give it another try.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm having a baby.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Oh. (He drops her hand.)
Pause

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You can go.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Thank you. (Gets up and hurries out.)
Monica and Chandler's, Obsessive Monica has finished opening all the presents. She's ashamed of this, at least, because as someone enters...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (throwing up the last present) I don't know how any of these got opened?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) You opened them all?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know! I know! I am a terrible person! I mean, Chandler is never going to trust me with anything ever again!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh hey! You got my parent's gift! (Holds it up.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah. What is that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, I don't know. I think it does something to salami.
Phoebe and Rachel enter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! How'd it go?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. What-what did Tag say?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Tag is not the father! And Joey knows now?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I do Rach. I do, and I so happy for you. (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow, you didn't even try to unhook my bra!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So are you ever gonna tell whoever it is?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I will. I'm just not up for it tonight.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey Rach listen, no matter what this guy says I want you to know you're not gonna be alone in this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm not?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Listen I uh... (He takes her hand.) It's a scary world out there especially if you're a single mom. Y'know, I always felt like you and I have this-this special bond. Y'know? So, (gets down on one knee again) Rachel Green will you marry me?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pheebs, give me the ring back!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! Joey, oh you're so sweet. You're so-so sweet, honey. But I'm not, I'm not looking for a husband.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (heartbroken) I understand.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Now, if you will excuse me I am going to go and lie down. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't say that didn't hurt. But I'll take you back Joey Tribbiani.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh yeah. Pheebs, listen about that. I only offered...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ooh! A Salami Buddy!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: There you go!
Chandler and Ross enter with the new pictures.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We're back!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Great! We're hangin' in the kitchen! (She drags him into the kitchen and turns his back to the living room) Let's stay in the kitchen!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's picture time.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Now you are going to love these.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (showing her the pictures) Here's a picture of Ross. (Shows another one.) And that's me. (Another one.) And that's me and Ross. (Another one.) Oh-ho, that is a picture of our first kiss as a married couple.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow! That is a great picture!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Eh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! Oh and interesting because I found the cameras in one of our bags! (Throws them into his chest.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Huh, didn't see that coming.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, so this isn't a picture of our first, but it is a picture of my first kiss with...with this lady. Which by the look on your face I'm sure you'll remember. So we don't need-(Rips the picture)-There's no need to have this picture. How about I take the real pictures and get them developed right now.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That would be a good idea.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Sees the living room.) You opened all the presents without me?! I thought we were supposed to do that together!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You kissed another woman!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Call it even?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! (They high-five and he walks out.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I'm gonna go get these (the floral bouquet he walked in with) in some water.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wait you stole those from these people's wedding?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no, I took them from the hotel lobby. Yeah, they think they can charge me for some dirty movie and a bag of Mashuga nuts, they got another think coming. (Starts to leave.) Hey! My sweater! I've been looking for this for like a month!
He exits leaving a stunned Phoebe and Monica.

lines.speaker: Monica and Phoebe
lines.text: Oh my God!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (slow on the uptake) Oh my God!
Closing Credits
A Street, Ross walks past Tag wearing the same red sweater.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! How you doing?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Good! Good, long time no see.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Like your sweater.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh hey, right back at ya.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Oh, it's crazy about Rachel huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. She-Well, she's one crazy lady?

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: So whose is it?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shows Tag his sweater tag) Umm, I don't some Italian guy. Come on, read your own label. See you later.

lines.speaker: Tag
lines.text: Okay.
They separate.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: He is so weird.
End
